Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.AbstractNElementary

Packages that use AbstractNElementary
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.jms.api
Supernaut JMS API
com.nib.supernaut.values
Value objects and constants for Supernaut.

  • Uses of AbstractNElementary in com.nib.commons.storage

    Subclasses of AbstractNElementary in com.nib.commons.storage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractNDecimal
    AbstractNDecimal is an abstract class designed to handle numeric values with a specified number of significant digits and adjustable decimal precision.
    class 
    AbstractNFloatingPoint
    AbstractNFloatingPoint is an abstract class representing a floating-point numeric data type.
    class 
    AbstractNNumeric
    Represents an abstract representation of a numeric field.
    class 
    NBinary
    NBinary is a subclass of AbstractNElementary and represents a binary field in memory with specific behavior and customizations.
    class 
    NChar
    Represents a character-based data structure that provides functionality for handling string, byte, and character values.
    class 
    NCharBin
    The NCharBin class extends the functionality of the NChar class.
    class 
    NCharInspected
    The NCharInspected class extends the NChar class by providing additional functionality to inspect and replace characters or substrings within the character sequence.
    class 
    NDouble
    NDouble is a concrete implementation of the AbstractNFloatingPoint class, representing a double-precision floating-point numeric data type.
    class 
    NFloat
    The NFloat class represents a single-precision floating-point numeric type.
    class 
    NInt16
    Represents a signed 16-bit integer (2-byte) data type.
    class 
    NInt32
    Represents a 32-bit signed integer within the numeric data types hierarchy.
    class 
    NInt64
    The NInt64 class represents a 64-bit signed integer data type.
    class 
    NInteger
    The NInteger class provides an implementation for handling numeric integer variables.
    class 
    NPacked
    The NPacked class represents a packed decimal data type typically used in memory-based numerical operations.
    class 
    NPointer
    Persistent pointer to a memory location.
    class 
    NUInt16
    The NUInt16 class represents an unsigned 16-bit integer.
    class 
    NUInt32
    The NUInt32 class represents a 32-bit unsigned integer in a specific data area structure.
    class 
    NZoned
    Represents a numeric, zoned-decimal formatted field with support for variable length, decimal places, and optional signed values.
    class 
    SpecialRegister
    The SpecialRegister class is a specialized extension of the NChar class used for creating and managing special register instances with predefined initial values.
    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage with type parameters of type AbstractNElementary
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type)
    Creates an array of the specified size, filled with clones of the provided type.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, byte initialValue)
    Creates an array of objects of a specified type, initializing each object with a provided initial value.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, byte[] initialValue)
    Creates and initializes an array of a specified size, populating it with clones of a given type.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, char initialValue)
    Creates an array of the specified size, of the same type as the given prototype object, and initializes its elements.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, double initialValue)
    Creates an array of objects of the specified type, initializes them, and optionally sets an initial value for objects of type AbstractNDecimal.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, int initialValue)
    Creates and initializes an array of objects of type T with a specified size.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, int[] initialValues)
    Creates and initializes an array of objects derived from AbstractNElementary.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, long initialValue)
    Creates and initializes an array of a specified size with elements cloned from the provided object and optionally assigns an initial value if the type supports it.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, String initialValue)
    Creates and initializes an array of elements of a specified type.
    static <T extends AbstractNElementary>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, String[] initialValues)
    Creates and initializes an array of objects of type T, where each element is a cloned instance of the given type.

    Creates and initializes an array of objects derived from AbstractNElementary.

    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, long initialValue)
    Creates and initializes an array of a specified size with elements cloned from the provided object and optionally assigns an initial value if the type supports it.

    Creates and initializes an array of elements of a specified type.

    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type, String[] initialValues)

    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage with parameters of type AbstractNElementary
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    NGroup.setValue(AbstractNElementary field)
    Sets the value of the current instance by transferring the data from the specified AbstractNElementary field and padding any remaining space.
